// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: BinarySearchInterpolation
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{
    private static readonly int[] _values = {
        1, 2, 3
    };

    private static readonly int[] _keys = new int[] {
        1, 2, 3
    };


    public static bool Contains(int key)
    {


        int lo = 0;
        int hi = 2;
        while (lo <= hi && key >= _keys[lo] && key <= _keys[hi])
        {
            int loKey = _keys[lo];
            int hiKey = _keys[hi];

            if (loKey == hiKey)
            {
                if (loKey == key)
                    return true;

                break;
            }

            double range = (double)hiKey - (double)loKey;
            double offset = (double)key - (double)loKey;
            int i = lo + (int)((offset * (hi - lo)) / range);

            if (i < lo)
                i = lo;
            else if (i > hi)
                i = hi;

            int midKey = _keys[i];
            if (midKey == key)
                return true;
            if (midKey < key)
                lo = i + 1;
            else
                hi = i - 1;
        }

        return false;
    }


    public static bool TryLookup(int key, out int? value)
    {


        int lo = 0;
        int hi = 2;
        while (lo <= hi && key >= _keys[lo] && key <= _keys[hi])
        {
            int loKey = _keys[lo];
            int hiKey = _keys[hi];

            if (loKey == hiKey)
            {
                if (loKey == key)
                {
                    value = _values[lo];
                    return true;
                }

                break;
            }

            double range = (double)hiKey - (double)loKey;
            double offset = (double)key - (double)loKey;
            int i = lo + (int)((offset * (hi - lo)) / range);

            if (i < lo)
                i = lo;
            else if (i > hi)
                i = hi;

            int midKey = _keys[i];
            if (midKey == key)
            {
                value = _values[i];
                return true;
            }
            if (midKey < key)
                lo = i + 1;
            else
                hi = i - 1;
        }

        value = default;
        return false;
    }

    public const uint ItemCount = 3;
    public const int MinKey = 1;
    public const int MaxKey = 3;
}
